history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, eye-level shot of a young person's face peeking out from under a comforter. Their dark, curly hair is tousled and frames their face. Only their eyes and the bridge of their nose are visible above the soft bedding. The comforter is a striped pattern of white and a pale, muted teal or aqua blue. The lighting is dim and warm, suggesting an indoor setting, perhaps a bedroom at night or early morning. The mood is intimate and relaxed, with a hint of sleepiness or coziness. The focus is sharp on the eyes, which are dark brown and appear slightly tired. The skin has a warm, natural tone. The background is a dark, out-of-focus gray, likely a wall or headboard.
